name: Blueberry Breakfast Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition, along with vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add flour and baking powder, stirring until just combined.
4. Spread half of the batter into an ungreased 15x10 inch pan.
5. Carefully top with blueberry pie filling.
6. Drop remaining batter in the pan by teaspoonfuls over the filling.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until golden brown. Do not underbake.
8. In a small bowl, combine powdered sugar, melted margarine, and lemon juice to create a glaze.
9. Drizzle the glaze evenly over the warm bars before serving.
